station_address: 142, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, opposite Equinoh, Ram Manohar Lohiya Nagar, Kurla West, Kurla, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070
text: I recently visited this fuel station and was very impressed with both the petrol pump and the attached car garage. The staff are professional, polite and quick to respond, which makes refuelling and servicing the car completely hassle‑free. The garage team explained the work clearly, gave a fair estimate and completed the service on time with no unnecessary add‑ons. The premises are clean, well‑organized and easy to access, with enough space for parking and safe movement of vehicles. Overall, a reliable place for quality fuel and trustworthy car repairs, and I would definitely recommend it to others.

station_address: 142, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, opposite Equinoh, Ram Manohar Lohiya Nagar, Kurla West, Kurla, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070
text: This petrol pump provides good service and the staff is cooperative. Fuel filling is quick and they follow proper procedures like zeroing the meter before filling. Digital payments like UPI are accepted, and the premises are fairly maintained. You can get your car servicing also done here from washing to any work. They manage queue well and don’t have wait in long queue. This is a good one.

station_address: 142, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, opposite Equinoh, Ram Manohar Lohiya Nagar, Kurla West, Kurla, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070
text: Excellent place. They have washrooms not too clean but just fine. You can also get your car servicing done from washing to any work that can be done. The staff is nice and friendly. They also have a gomechanic center. You can do get wheel alignment and wheel balancing done. They manage the queue very well and you don't have to wait too long as other petrol pumps. This is a good one.
